title: melilotus sulcatus var. compactus
intro: Melilotus sulcatus var. compactus, also known as compact melilot or white sweet clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of compact melilot include its use in treating digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Compact melilot is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
